title: The current story of human evolution may be incomplete - David Reich
summary: David Reich argues that the current scientific understanding of human evolution contains significant gaps. The conversation explores areas where mainstream evolutionary theory may be incomplete or require revision based on recent genomic and archaeological evidence.
